notes:
Seems to be working, with and without controller.. -Only thing that seems weird is that 'Esc'-button takes out of fullscreen, and takes the game window out of focus. (This is not a review of the game, but since the keyboard-scheme layout is kinda weird,  not sure if it is supposed to exit the fullscreen) Either or; this is easily remedied; by not pressing 'Esc' and setting the fullscreen back from options.. 
 -And no other problems were discovered, so I think we're still in the platinum.
title: Disorder

notes: The game sometimes freezes for about a second when playing in full screen. Works perfectly otherwise.
title: Disorder
